scripts.recipe:validate: pnpm -s build:server && node dist/cli/index.js validate fixtures/recipes/oyakodon.json
scripts.recipe:dry-run: pnpm -s build:server && node dist/cli/index.js dry-run fixtures/recipes/oyakodon.json --data-dir .tmp/recipe-app
scripts.recipe:import:sample: pnpm -s build:server && node dist/cli/index.js import fixtures/recipes/oyakodon.json --data-dir .tmp/recipe-app
scripts.recipe:import-all:dry-run: pnpm -s build:server && node dist/cli/index.js import-all --recipes-dir fixtures/recipes --data-dir .tmp/recipe-app --dry-run
